section_title_bodytext_mission_briefing: Great to have you on board!
section_bodytext_paragraph_one_mission_b: I am your guide through the digital galaxy: from pixel planets to HTML & CSS orbits to interactive interfaces that take off. My mission? To bring designs to life and steer code into smooth stellar trajectories.
section_bodytext_paragraph_two_mission_b: I combine UI design with front-end development: conceptually well thought-out, technically clean, and with a clear focus on user guidance. My goal is to design digital products that are visually appealing as well as high-performing and structured.
copyright: 2026 Virginia Dächer - Made with curiosity, clean code & a love for good interfaces.
school_1_qualification: Apprenticeship as Digital & Print Media Designer
section_bodytext_paragraph_mission_log: My complete mission log and past missions are waiting for you. Toggle one of the two switches and set your course.

project_koelnticket_description: Mission: Further development of digital ticketing platforms for the cultural and events industry. Since 2017, I have been involved in the conception, design, and technical implementation of new features to improve the user experience. Working closely with design and development teams, we created solutions that intuitively guide users through extensive event offerings. My focus was on the integration of UI design and front-end development—from the initial concept through design to implementation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript within the TYPO3 CMS. The example shown features an artist page that I conceived, designed, and technically implemented on my own. Workload: UX / UI, concept, implementation in Fluid, LESS, and JavaScript Tools: Adobe XD, PHPStorm
